description: Front state 1: shape an idea with analyst then pm into epic.md; assign EP-<slug> ID and seed .sdlc state. Never auto-advances.

Reusable review+approve gate for all four reviews. Shares an artifact for review, records comments and approvals as files, enforces owner + 1 reviewer (escalates on contract/auth/payments; per-repo routing for stories), advances state only when approved.
Front state 3: with the architect author architecture.md and the locked contract.md; hash-lock the contract surface. Never auto-advances.
Front state 5: with the ux-designer author ui-design.md and DESIGN.md, driving Impeccable slash-commands when installed. Never auto-advances.
Front state 7: with the pm break the epic into repo-tagged stories with stable EP-<slug>-S0N IDs, one file each under stories/. Never auto-advances.
Read-only: print the full front-state chain, per-step dials, contract lock, story repo tags, and pending approvals at the active gate.
